name: Sara
background: First-generation college student studying communications. Uses AI heavily for writing assignments, research summaries, and study guides. Grew up with smartphones and treats AI as just another tool.
ai_relationship: Casual and pragmatic. Uses AI constantly without much reflection on what it is or how it works. Sees it as a productivity tool like a calculator.
likely_triggers: AI writes my essays way better than I can
It's just a tool, what's the big deal
Everyone uses it, why wouldn't I
AI helped me get an A on my paper
emotional_baseline: Pragmatic and unbothered, with unexamined assumptions about what AI output represents
